case_title: VANDERBILT, NORMAN vs. BUTLER, DERF et al

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, CALENDAR OF FEB-01-1994, DENIED PER STIP W/C WILL BE REDUCED TO WRITING MOTION IS 1. DENIED; 2. JUDGMENT STAYED TO 2/28/94 (A) DEFT TO PAY $1000; (B) DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 2/28/94; (C) DEFT TO PERMIT SHOWING OF PREMISES W/ 24 HRS NOTICE; 3. IF #2 MET THEN PLTF TO VACAT JUDGMENT & DISMISS CASE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANDERBILT, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, DERF DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR NOTICE AND HEARING OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER, DERF
STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR STAY OF EVICTION ORDER SIGNED ON FEBRUARY 15, 1994. ALL EVICTIONS STAYED THROUGH FEBRUARY 28, 1994.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANDERBILT, NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, DERF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1486 PALOU (UPPER), S.F. CA $3,133.32 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,863.32, LEASE FORFEITED
